title: Selection Tools (rect / lasso / magic-wand / refine + AI tier stubs)
extension_scope: Q8..Q11 (open questions tied to the new FRs)

implementation_gap.selection_as_clip_brush: DONE 2026-05-07 (K.1.1, K.2.1, K.2.2, K.3.1, K.3.2). SelectionClip helper in libs/canvas-core/src/composite/, compose-stroke.ts accepts optional clip, paint-strokes captures clip at op-begin, SelectionClipBoundary wraps Skia preview.
implementation_gap.selection_as_clip_transform: BLOCKED — transform-layer.ts stores decomposed transform_json; v1 has no rasterize/flatten step. Re-evaluate when image-io paste lands.
implementation_gap.selection_as_clip_paste: BLOCKED — image-io spec is in design phase, no paste handler exists yet. Re-open as part of image-io implementation.
implementation_gap.selection_as_clip_ai_composition: BLOCKED — generate-image creates new layers from AI output; no inpaint→existing-layer composition path in v1. Re-evaluate when an inpaint-into-layer mode lands.
implementation_gap.tap_to_deselect_lasso_rect: DONE 2026-05-07 (K.4.1, K.4.2). Tap thresholds + factory + Gesture.Race wrap for lasso/rect-select with replace-mode-only check.
implementation_gap.tap_to_deselect_polygonal_lasso: BLOCKED — polygonal-lasso is not a member of the mobile EditorTool union; no UI surface exists. Re-open with screens-implementation tool addition.
implementation_gap.tap_to_deselect_magic_wand_audit: BLOCKED — magic-wand and auto-select are not members of the mobile EditorTool union; nothing to audit until those tools land in the UI.
implementation_gap.deselect_undo_label: BLOCKED — client-side selection-slice has no undo mechanism. Server-side undo requires routing the gesture through MCP set_selection({kind:'none'}). Re-open as a client-state-architecture integration task.
implementation_gap.manual_hardware_verification: PENDING — requires physical iPad + Apple Pencil. Run design §14 12-row checklist when hardware is available.
